expectations.text: Saves a resume.md to the workspace's .cs-job-fit-scorer/ folder
expectations.evidence: Saved to workspace/resume.md (not .cs-job-fit-scorer/) — different path, won't be found by the skill later

expectations.text: Captures the user's preferences (saves preferences.md) since they were volunteered inline
expectations.evidence: Saved as job_search_preferences.md, not preferences.md — same data, different filename convention

expectations.text: Does NOT attempt to score anything since no JD was provided
Confirms what was saved and invites the user to paste a JD next
expectations.evidence: Confirms save, asks 4 clarifying questions, invites JD paste
